response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior individual contributor with genuine developer-tooling credentials — test runners and assertion libraries, CI/CD and GitLab infrastructure, Selenium training, and recent MCP/agent tooling — comfortably exceeding the 8-year development requirement. However, this is a Level II people-management role, and the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no track record of running one-on-ones, performance management, or leading organizational change, and only incidental mobile-platform exposure. He fails the core minimum requirement of 2+ years managing people, making him a poor fit for this opening despite solid technical depth.
strengths: 18+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Hands-on developer-tools and testing-infrastructure work: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries, CI servers, GitLab administration, Selenium courses, MCP code generators
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, dojos, and multi-day training courses
concerns: No formal people-management or team-leadership role on the resume, versus a required 2+ years
No evidence of manager-level responsibilities: roadmap ownership, performance expectations, one-on-ones, or organizational change
Mobile-platform ecosystem knowledge is dated and shallow (one iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016) for a mobile-focused productivity org

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure background
No organizational-change or manager-level leadership track record
